evidence_paragraphs.snippet: The wildling band led by [Styr](wiki:Styr) and [Jarl](wiki:Jarl) stay in a [cave near Greyguard](wiki:Cave_near_Greyguard) the night before the planned attempt to scale the [Wall](wiki:Wall)....

[Styr](wiki:Styr) and [Jarl](wiki:Jarl) force Jon to tell themmore about the patrols the [Night's Watch](wiki:Night's_Watch) use along the Wall. [Jarl](wiki:Jarl) and Styr plan to climb the Wall...
